name: Doctor Who — Deep Movie fMRI
description: A single-subject deep fMRI dataset from the Radboud Data Repository in which one participant watched ~23 hours ('Doctor Who') of audiovisual drama. Designed for high-power individual encoding/decoding models of naturalistic vision.
citation: Seeliger K, et al. (2019). A large single-participant fMRI dataset for probing brain responses to naturalistic stimuli in space and time. bioRxiv.
